raw_jd:
We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our fast growing product team in Bangalore.

Role: Backend Developer (Senior)
Location: Hybrid – Bangalore / Remote
CTC: 18-24 LPA depending on experience

About the role:
You will own the design and development of our core APIs and microservices. We need a rockstar who can hit the ground running and work independently with minimal supervision.

Responsibilities:
- Design, build and maintain REST and GraphQL APIs
- Work closely with frontend and DevOps teams to ship features
- Own database schema design and query optimization (PostgreSQL, Redis)
- Lead code reviews and mentor junior engineers
- Contribute to system architecture decisions and technical roadmap
- 5+ years of professional backend engineering experience required
- Experience with distributed systems and cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred)

Must have skills:
- Python or Node.js (we use both)
- PostgreSQL and Redis
- Docker and Kubernetes basics
- Git and CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions)
- Strong understanding of REST API design

Nice to have:
- Experience with Kafka or RabbitMQ
- Prior experience at a Series B or later startup
- GraphQL

We move fast. If you are a ninja coder who loves ownership and impact, this is the role for you.
one_line_summary: A Senior role focused on designing and developing core APIs and microservices in a fast-growing product environment..
raw_text_justification: 5+ years of professional backend engineering experience required
